languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's shoulders heave at the sight of his hated enemy, as if the Rogue Trader is filling his cybernetic lungs in anticipation of a decisive battle.{/n} "You wanted me back, xenos? Here I am. I will destroy both you and these unholy halls. The ruins of your museum, so dear to your cursed soul — if you have one — shall serve as a funerary monument to Laria Voigtvir..."

languages.text: {n}При виде ненавистного врага плечи Себериана тяжело вздымаются — Вольный Торговец словно набирает воздуха в кибернетические легкие перед решающим боем.{/n} "Ты хотел вернуть меня, ксенос? Я здесь. Я уничтожу и тебя, и эти нечистые палаты. Руины твоего музея, что так дорог твоей проклятой душе — если у тебя она есть — станут погребальным монументом Ларии Войгтвир..."

{n}Seberian's shoulders heave at the sight of his hated enemy, as if the Rogue Trader is filling his cybernetic lungs in anticipation of a decisive battle.{/n} "You wanted me back, xenos? Here I am. I will destroy both you and these unholy halls. The ruins of your museum, so dear to your cursed soul — if you have one — shall serve as a funerary monument to Laria Voigtvir..."

I will destroy both you and these unholy halls. The ruins of your museum, so dear to your cursed soul — if you have one — shall serve as a funerary monument to Laria Voigtvir..."

languages.text: {n}Los hombros de Seberian se tensan nada más ver a su odiado enemigo, como si el Comerciante Independiente estuviese hinchando sus pulmones cibernéticos ante la expectativa de una batalla decisiva.{/n} «¿Querías que volviera, xenos? Pues aquí me tienes. Acabaré contigo y con este impío lugar. Las ruinas de tu museo, tan apreciado por tu alma maldita, si es que aún la conservas, servirán como monumento funerario para Laria Voigtvir...».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's shoulders heave at the sight of his hated enemy, as if the Rogue Trader is filling his cybernetic lungs in anticipation of a decisive battle.{/n} "You wanted me back, xenos? Here I am. I will destroy both you and these unholy halls. The ruins of your museum, so dear to your cursed soul — if you have one — shall serve as a funerary monument to Laria Voigtvir..."

Pues aquí me tienes. Acabaré contigo y con este impío lugar. Las ruinas de tu museo, tan apreciado por tu alma maldita, si es que aún la conservas, servirán como monumento funerario para Laria Voigtvir...».

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安看到痛恨的敌人时，肩膀剧烈起伏，仿佛在为他的机械肺蓄力，只等决一死战。{/n}“你想要我回来，异形？我就在这儿。我会摧毁你，连同这些亵渎的厅堂。这座被你那肮脏灵魂——如果你还算有灵魂的话——视若珍宝的陈列馆，将成为菈丽雅·维特威尔的墓葬纪念碑……”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's shoulders heave at the sight of his hated enemy, as if the Rogue Trader is filling his cybernetic lungs in anticipation of a decisive battle.{/n} "You wanted me back, xenos? Here I am. I will destroy both you and these unholy halls. The ruins of your museum, so dear to your cursed soul — if you have one — shall serve as a funerary monument to Laria Voigtvir..."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安看到痛恨的敌人时，肩膀剧烈起伏，仿佛在为他的机械肺蓄力，只等决一死战。{/n}“你想要我回来，异形？我就在这儿。我会摧毁你，连同这些亵渎的厅堂。这座被你那肮脏灵魂——如果你还算有灵魂的话——视若珍宝的陈列馆，将成为菈丽雅·维特威尔的墓葬纪念碑……”

languages.text: {n}Seberian bombe le torse en voyant son ennemi tant haï, comme s'il remplissait ses poumons cybernétiques en prévision d'une bataille décisive.{/n} « Vous vouliez que je revienne, xénos ? Eh bien, me voici. Je vais vous anéantir en même temps que cet endroit impie. Les ruines de votre musée si cher à votre âme maudite, si tant est que vous en ayez une, serviront de monument funéraire à Laria Voigtvir... »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's shoulders heave at the sight of his hated enemy, as if the Rogue Trader is filling his cybernetic lungs in anticipation of a decisive battle.{/n} "You wanted me back, xenos? Here I am. I will destroy both you and these unholy halls. The ruins of your museum, so dear to your cursed soul — if you have one — shall serve as a funerary monument to Laria Voigtvir..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian bombe le torse en voyant son ennemi tant haï, comme s'il remplissait ses poumons cybernétiques en prévision d'une bataille décisive.{/n} « Vous vouliez que je revienne, xénos ? Eh bien, me voici. Je vais vous anéantir en même temps que cet endroit impie. Les ruines de votre musée si cher à votre âme maudite, si tant est que vous en ayez une, serviront de monument funéraire à Laria Voigtvir... »

languages.text: {n}Nefret ettiği düşmanını görünce Seberian'ın omuzları inip kalkıyor. Sanki Hür Tacir, belirleyici olacak bir savaşın yaşanması beklentisiyle sibernetik akciğerlerini dolduruyor.{/n} "Beni geri mi istiyorsun zeno? Karşındayım. Hem seni hem de bu lanetli salonları yok edeceğim. Varlığı şüpheli ruhun için bunca değeri olan müzenin harabeleri, Laria Voigtvir'in mezar anıtı olacak..."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's shoulders heave at the sight of his hated enemy, as if the Rogue Trader is filling his cybernetic lungs in anticipation of a decisive battle.{/n} "You wanted me back, xenos? Here I am. I will destroy both you and these unholy halls. The ruins of your museum, so dear to your cursed soul — if you have one — shall serve as a funerary monument to Laria Voigtvir..."

Sanki Hür Tacir, belirleyici olacak bir savaşın yaşanması beklentisiyle sibernetik akciğerlerini dolduruyor.{/n} "Beni geri mi istiyorsun zeno? Karşındayım. Hem seni hem de bu lanetli salonları yok edeceğim. Varlığı şüpheli ruhun için bunca değeri olan müzenin harabeleri, Laria Voigtvir'in mezar anıtı olacak..."

languages.text: {n}Seberians Schultern haben sich beim Anblick des verhassten Feindes, als würde der Freihändler aus Vorfreude auf einen Entscheidungskampf seine kybernetischen Lungen füllen.{/n} "Ihr wolltet mich wiederhaben, Xenos? Hier bin ich. Ich werde Euch und diese unheiligen Hallen vernichten. Die Ruinen Eures Museums, das Eurer verfluchten Seele so wichtig ist ... sofern ihr überhaupt eine Seele habt ... soll als Grabmonument für Laria Voigtvir dienen ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's shoulders heave at the sight of his hated enemy, as if the Rogue Trader is filling his cybernetic lungs in anticipation of a decisive battle.{/n} "You wanted me back, xenos? Here I am. I will destroy both you and these unholy halls. The ruins of your museum, so dear to your cursed soul — if you have one — shall serve as a funerary monument to Laria Voigtvir..."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは憎むべき敵の出現に肩をすくめた。まるでそのローグ・トレーダーが決戦を控えてサイバーネティックな肺を膨らませているかのようだ。{/n} 「お前が俺を呼び戻したのか、異種族？ ここにいる。お前とこの不浄な館を破壊する。お前が愛する呪われた魂の博物館の廃墟は、ラリア・ヴォイストヴィルの墓碑となるだろう…」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's shoulders heave at the sight of his hated enemy, as if the Rogue Trader is filling his cybernetic lungs in anticipation of a decisive battle.{/n} "You wanted me back, xenos?
